query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `19_trello_card_overrides` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `cardId` varchar(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `nomeCliente` varchar(255),
  `telefone` varchar(50),
  `email` varchar(255),
  `placa` varchar(20),
  `marca` varchar(100),
  `modelo` varchar(100),
  `categoria` varchar(100),
  `mecanico` varchar(100),
  `responsavel` varchar(100),
  `valorAprovado` varchar(50),
  `valorCusto` varchar(50),
  `km` varchar(20),
  `dataEntrada` varchar(50),
  `previsaoEntrega` varchar(50),
  `diagnostico` text,
  `atualizadoEm` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
